'''Xoemefel''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Xoemefel system/Legends|Xoemefel system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was the site of [[Ops Post]], a [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services|New Republic Scout Service]] base.

{{Planet-stub}}
